summary: Comprehensive testing of infrastructure audit features for iteration 119. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed for login flow, dashboard loading, BottomNav navigation, Movie button directing to /marketing/studio?mode=directed, and PipelineView auto-selecting 'Estudio' campaign type. PWA assets (manifest.json, service-worker.js) accessible. Observability middleware adds X-Request-Id and X-Response-Time headers. Cache endpoints require auth. Deep health check returns dependency status.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - Recharts chart container sizing issue. Not critical but should be fixed for cleaner console.

action_items: Fix Recharts chart container sizing warning in Dashboard (width/height -1)
critical_code_review_comments: Infrastructure refactoring is well-implemented with proper separation of concerns
Circuit breaker pattern correctly implemented with automatic failover
Observability middleware adds proper request tracing headers
PWA manifest and service worker properly configured
Code splitting with React.lazy reduces initial bundle size
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@agentflow.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infrastructure audit complete. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. All new features working: ErrorBoundary, Code Splitting, PWA, GZip compression, Observability middleware (X-Request-Id, X-Response-Time), Rate limiting, Auth on cache endpoints, Deep health check, Circuit Breaker pattern, Provider Pattern for AI. Movie button in BottomNav navigates to /marketing/studio?mode=directed and PipelineView auto-selects 'Estudio' campaign type.
